title: Emmanuel Katto from Dubai : How can we improve the quality of PDF exports from WorkDocs?
excerpt:
Hi team, 
I’m Emmanuel Katto from Dubai, United Arab Emirates (UAE) looking for ways to improve the quality of PDF exports from WorkDocs, as they often lose formatting during the export process. If anyone has suggestions…

posts.author: emmanuelkatto24 (Emmanuel Katto)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi team,

I’m Emmanuel Katto from Dubai, United Arab Emirates (UAE) looking for ways to improve the quality of PDF exports from WorkDocs, as they often lose formatting during the export process. If anyone has suggestions or tips on how to achieve better results, I’d really appreciate your input!

Thanks!

Regards
Emmanuel Katto

posts.author: SirEric (Eric Maranga)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Emmanuel,

Have you considered using PDF Exporter for monday.com by Appfire? It offers a more customizable approach to exporting your data to PDFs and may help preserve formatting better than the default export option.

While we’re not affiliated in any way, many users have found it beneficial for improving the quality of their exports.

If you have any questions or need further assistance, feel free to reach out to me via email at mail@creativebits.us or Contact Creative Bits. We’d be happy to help!

Best regards.

posts.author: JenefaJ (Jenefa)
posts.cookedHtml:
Yes, this is possible with The PDF Maker (app.thepdfmaker.com).

If you’re looking to improve the quality and control of PDF exports from WorkDocs, The PDF Maker could be the perfect fit. It gives you complete formatting flexibility—fonts, layout, spacing, image placement, headers/footers, and even the ability to eliminate borders or placeholder styling. This ensures the final PDFs look professional and consistent across devices or recipients.

Every new response triggers the PDF generation automatically, so there’s no need for manual intervention.

Please view the support article below:

help.thepdfmaker.com

Automate Documents with the Monday App - Full Guide | The PDF Maker Help Center

Master document automation using the Monday app and PDF Maker. Streamline workflows and enhance productivity by effortlessly generating PDFs directly from Monday.com.

posts.author: christiaan.page (Christiaan Page)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Jenefa, how does this app work with a standalone Workdoc?
I have a very detailed wiki that i wish to export to a PDF which I want to format using our corporate formating. The PDF Maker appears to only work when integrated with a Board? Thanks for your help! CP
